zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine於1301年出生在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 洛波格奧廷根時，她的父親Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen32歲，母親Anna Countess Of Dornberg34歲。她於1320年與Adolf von der Pfalz結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1389年11月6日在德國海藍-普法爾茲喬姆斯享年88歲，埋葬在奧地利波麥萊其格利貝瑙。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine于1301年出生在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 洛波格奧廷根时，她的父亲Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen32岁，母亲Anna Countess Of Dornberg34岁。她于1320年与Adolf von der Pfalz结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1389年11月6日在德国海藍-普法爾茲喬姆斯享年88岁，埋葬在奥地利波麥萊其格利貝瑙。

nameMeanings.name: Oettingen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hanni, Christoph, Siegbert.
German (also Öttinger): habitational name for someone from a place in Bavaria called Oettingen or a place in Lorraine (France) called Öttingen (French Ottange). Compare Ottinger and Ettinger .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Ettinger  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Ottinger
meanings: German (also Öttinger): habitational name for someone from any of the places called Otting or Öttingen, in Swabia, Bavaria, and Lorraine (France). Compare Oettinger .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Ettinger  , a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Irmengard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine was born in 1301, in Ottingen, Rotenburg, Lower Saxony, Germany, her father, Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen, was 32 and her mother, Anna Countess Of Dornberg, was 34. She married Adolf von der Pfalz in 1320. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 6 November 1389, in Worms, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 88, and was buried in Liebenau, Reichenberg, Bohemia, Austria.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine est née en 1301, à Ottingen, Landkreis Rotenburg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, son père, Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Anna Countess Of Dornberg, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Adolf von der Pfalz en 1320. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 6 novembre 1389, à Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à Liebenau, Reichenberg, Bohême, Autriche.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine 1301 in Ottingen, Landkreis Rotenburg, Niedersachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen 32 und ihre Mutter Anna Countess Of Dornberg 34. Sie hat 1320 Adolf von der Pfalz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 6. November 1389 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland und wurde in Liebenau, Reichenberg, Böhmen, Österreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine è nata il nel 1301 nel Ottingen, Landkreis Rotenburg, Niedersachsen, Germania, sua padre, Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Anna Countess Of Dornberg, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Adolf von der Pfalz nel 1320. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 novembre 1389, nel Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolta a Liebenau, Reichenberg, Böhmen, Austria.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhineが1301年にドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス ロテンブルグオッティンジェンで生まれた時，父Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingenは32歳，母Anna Countess Of Dornbergは34歳であった。1320年にAdolf von der Pfalzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1389年11月6日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズウオルムズで88歳で死去し，オーストリアブoメンレイチェンバーグリーベナウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine(이)가 1301년 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 로텐버그 오틴겐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Countess Of Dornberg(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1320년 Adolf von der Pfalz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1389년 11월 6일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 워스에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 오스트리아 브oh멘 라이천버그 리베나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine nasceu em 1301, em Ottingen, Landkreis Rotenburg, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Anna Countess Of Dornberg, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Adolf von der Pfalz em 1320. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1389, em Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 88 anos, e foi sepultada em Liebenau, Reichenberg, Böhmen, Áustria.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine родилась в 1301 г. в местности оттинген, ландкрис ротенбург, ниедирсачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Anna Countess Of Dornberg, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adolf von der Pfalz в 1320 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 6 ноября 1389 г. в местности вормс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности лиебенау, раичэнбирг, бoхмен, Австрия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Irmengard Oettingen Countess of the Rhine nació en 1301, en Ottingen, Landkreis Rotenburg, Niedersachsen, Alemania, su papá, Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Anna Countess Of Dornberg, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Adolf von der Pfalz en 1320. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1389, en Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultada en Liebenau, Reichenberg, Böhmen, Austria.
